title: mentha foetida
intro: Mentha foetida, also known as Indian pennyroyal or pudina, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) and is native to the Indian subcontinent. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a digestive aid, an antiseptic, and an anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Mentha foetida include relief from menstrual cramps, fever, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to aid in weight loss and improve respiratory health. Herbal preparations of Mentha foetida include teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
